recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: He Got Game
recommendations.overview: A basketball player's father must try to convince him to go to a college so he can get a shorter prison sentence.

recommendations.title: Chi-Raq
recommendations.overview: A modern day adaptation of the ancient Greek play Lysistrata by Aristophanes, set against the backdrop of gang violence in Chicago.

recommendations.title: BlacKkKlansman
recommendations.overview: Colorado Springs, late 1970s. Ron Stallworth, an African American police officer, and Flip Zimmerman, his Jewish colleague, run an undercover operation to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan.

recommendations.title: Shooting Stars
recommendations.overview: The inspiring origin story of a basketball superhero, revealing how LeBron James and his childhood friends become the #1 high school team in the country, launching James's breathtaking career as a four-time NBA Champion, two-time Olympic Gold Medalis

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Hustle
recommendations.overview: After discovering a once-in-a-lifetime player with a rocky past abroad, a down on his luck basketball scout takes it upon himself to bring the phenom to the States without his team's approval. Against the odds, they have one final shot to prove they

recommendations.title: Jigoku
recommendations.overview: A group of sinners involved in interconnected tales of murder, revenge, deceit and adultery all meet at the Gates of Hell.

recommendations.title: Juwanna Mann
recommendations.overview: A basketball star is booted out of the NBA when his on-court antics go too far, so he poses as a woman and joins the WUBA.

recommendations.title: Expedition Happiness
recommendations.overview: A German couple and their dog travel across North America in a school bus searching for a state of pure bliss.
